zh: 一段旅程，因相遇而開始；一個約定，因相伴而成為永恆。
en: A journey begins with a simple encounter, a promise grows as we walk side by side into forever.

zh: 2026.06.14 · 12:00 · 大直典華 · 臺北市中山區植福路8號
en: Jun 14, 2026 · 12:00 PM · Da Zhi Denwell · No. 8, Zhifu Road, Zhongshan District, Taipei City, Taiwan

zh: 一生兩人 三餐四季
en: One life, two people, three meals a day, four seasons

zh: 我們喜歡在旅途中發現新的風景，也在日常裡收藏平凡卻珍貴的片刻。那些一起走過的日子，就像一張張手繪的明信片，記錄著我們的笑聲、陪伴與小小的冒險。希望當你來到這裡，也能感受到這份清新又溫暖的氛圍，和我們一起分享屬於這一天的喜悅。
en:
We love to slow down and truly see the days we share,
turning each moment into something like a hand-drawn postcard.
We hope you feel the same gentle, fresh warmth here.

zh:
生日:6/28
星座:巨蟹座
興趣:睡覺、健身、吃貨
喜歡的食物:無肉、無酒不歡
討厭的東西:新娘愛囉嗦
怎麼稱呼新娘:寶貝
喜歡在家裡邊寫code邊看電視、進健身房運動，陪著又瑄爬爬小山，假日一起準備三餐
en:
He enjoys coding at home with the TV softly playing,
staying active at the gym,
hiking gentle trails with Lillian,
and spending weekends cooking simple meals together —
finding comfort in a well-balanced, everyday life.

zh:
生日:7/13
星座:巨蟹座
興趣:戶外運動、吃貨
喜歡的食物:芋頭、地瓜球
討厭的東西:新郎的一塊腹肌
怎麼稱呼新郎:豬豬
熱愛大自然與旅行，也喜歡到健身房運動。更享受的是，為兩個人安排一場說走就走的小旅行。
en: Loves plants, travel, and decorating cozy corners with family. She says the wedding is for collecting their first promises.

zh:
在一起的第一年，
我們只有週末兩天可以見面。

那時的又瑄開始愛上爬山，
假日不是在山上，
就是在通往山上的路上。

與書恒相伴的日子，
總帶著細雨與溫柔。

兩年半的時光裡，
又瑄總是拉著書恒四處旅行，
讓原本喜歡待在家的他，
從皮膚白皙，慢慢曬成了現在的健康膚色。

他從未埋怨，
總是靜靜地在那裡。

讓回頭變得安心，
也讓未來變得清晰。

於是，我們決定——
把彼此寫進接下來的每一個季節。
en: In our first year together, Lillian began to fall in love with hiking,and the days shared with Ryan were often wrapped in gentle rain and quiet tenderness. Over the past two and a half years,Ryan has always been there, turning every glance back into reassurance, and every step forward into clarity. And so, we chose to write each other into every season yet to come.

zh: 我們選了交通方便、充滿自然氣息的地點，歡迎提前到附近散散步。
en: We chose a convenient venue wrapped in nature—feel free to stroll the neighborhood beforehand.

zh: 臺北市中山區植福路8號
en: No. 8, Zhifu Road, Zhongshan District, Taipei City, Taiwan

zh: 捷運｜搭乘文湖線至「劍南路站2號出口」步行約 5 分鐘。
en: Metro · Wenhu Line to Jiannan Road Station 2 Exit, 5 min walk.

zh: 開車｜場地下方設有停車場可直達宴會廳。
en: Driving · Underground parking leads straight to the hall.

zh: 若你需要接駁或協助，請在問卷中留言，我們會安排小幫手與你聯繫。
en: Need a shuttle or assistance? Leave a note in the RSVP and we'll have a helper contact you.
We want to take good care of you

zh: 此表單之後會串接 Google Sheets，現在先用簡易版本收集需求。
en: We'll later connect this form to Google Sheets; for now it gathers your needs simply.

zh: 表單送出後會跳出感謝訊息正式串接 Google Sheets 時會再通知。
en: You'll see a thank-you message after sending; we'll update you when Google Sheets integration is live.

zh: 收到你的回覆了謝謝你！
送出時發生問題請稍後再試。
en: Something went wrong—please try again soon.

zh: 目前無法連線請檢查網路後重試。
en: We can't reach the RSVP server right now. Check your connection and try again.
May this ceremony be shared with you

zh: 把我們的祝福寫進一封喜帖，誠摯邀請你一起見證這一天。
en: A gentle card to hand our blessings to you.

zh: 誠摯邀請你，與我們一起見證，一段關於兩個人、三餐與四季的開始。在這一天，我們將許下攜手一生的承諾，把平凡的日常，慢慢過成彼此的未來。期待與你相聚，一起留下最溫暖的回憶。
en: With grateful hearts, we invite you to witness a promise gently growing in the forest. On a sunlit afternoon surrounded by greenery, we will exchange vows, light a candle,and share this warm moment together. We look forward to creating the sweetest memories with you.

zh: 願你今天也被幸福包圍
en: May today wrap you in gentleness
We hid little phrases in every place card and light, waiting for you to find them. Can't wait to toast with you under the trees.

zh: 可直接部署於 GitHub Pages 的單頁喜帖網站｜感謝你的祝福
en: Single-page invite ready for GitHub Pages · Thank you for your love
